# Johnny's Barbershop — Salem, OR
> Johnny's Barbershop is a barbershop in Salem, Oregon for fades, classic cuts, beard trims and hot-towel shaves. Bilingual (English/Spanish). 388 State St. Call (503) 510-8642.

## Services
- Haircuts & Fades
- Beard & Line-up
- Hot-Towel Shave
- Kids' Cuts
- Designs & Details

## Service area
- Salem, Keizer, West Salem, Marion County (ZIPs: 97301)

## Contact
- Call/text: (503) 510-8642 · Hours: Walk-ins & appointments — call for today's hours · Languages: English, Español
